- _xpc_activity_set_state
CStrings:
+ "\n    group by provenance, shard\n) as data inner join data_provenances as p on data.provenance = p.ROWID\ngroup by data.shard, p.sync_identity\norder by data.shard, p.sync_identity;"
+ " AS INTEGER) AS avg_age_days\nFROM samples AS s\nINNER JOIN objects AS o ON o.data_id = s.data_id\nGROUP BY s.data_type\nORDER BY sample_count DESC\nLIMIT ?"
+ " Please file a radar against 'HealthKit Feature Support | Routes'."
+ " USING(data_id) "
+ " and s.data_type in (?,?)"
+ " for subdomain %@"
+ " qualifying non-watch device(s) with recent context updates"
+ " quote in command string"

+ "INSERT INTO %@ (%@, %@, %@, %@, %@, %@, %@, %@) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) ON CONFLICT (%@) DO UPDATE SET %@ = excluded.%@, %@ = excluded.%@, %@ = excluded.%@, %@ = excluded.%@, %@ = excluded.%@, %@ = excluded.%@ WHERE excluded.%@ >= %@.%@ AND (excluded.%@ >= %@.%@ OR excluded.%@ = 0)"
+ "INSERT INTO medical_user_domain_concept_mappings_new (ROWID, udc_id, data_id)             SELECT ROWID, udc_id, data_id FROM medical_user_domain_concept_mappings         "
+ "INSERT INTO objects (uuid, provenance, type, creation_date)                                 SELECT uuid, ? as provenance, ? as type, ? as creation_date                               FROM temp_data"
+ "INSERT INTO samples (data_id, data_type, start_date, end_date)             SELECT objects.data_id as data_id, 5 as data_type, start_date, end_date             FROM temp_data             INNER JOIN objects USING (uuid)"
+ "INSERT INTO temp_data (uuid, start_date, end_date, data_id, hfd_key)         SELECT objects.uuid as uuid, samples.start_date as start_date, samples.end_date as end_date, objects.data_id as data_id,                  quantity_sample_series.hfd_key as hfd_key         FROM samples         INNER JOIN objects USING (data_id)         INNER JOIN data_provenances ON objects.provenance = data_provenances.ROWID         LEFT JOIN quantity_sample_series USING (data_id)         WHERE         data_provenances.origin_product_type LIKE '%%Watch%%'         AND %@(data_provenances.origin_build, '24R204') >= 0         AND %@(data_provenances.origin_build, '24R213') < 0         AND samples.data_type = 5         "

+ "SELECT s.data_type,\n       COUNT(*) AS sample_count,\n       ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), 3) AS percent,\n       CAST((? - AVG(s.start_date)) / "
+ "SELECT s.data_type,\n       SUM(CASE WHEN p.origin_product_type LIKE 'iPhone%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS iphone_count,\n       SUM(CASE WHEN p.origin_product_type LIKE 'iPad%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ipad_count,\n       SUM(CASE WHEN p.origin_product_type LIKE 'Watch%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS watch_count,\n       SUM(CASE WHEN p.origin_product_type LIKE 'AirPods%'\n                  OR p.origin_product_type LIKE 'AudioAccessory%'\n                  OR p.origin_product_type LIKE 'iProd%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS airpods_count,\n       SUM(CASE WHEN p.origin_product_type LIKE 'RealityDevice%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS vision_count,\n       COUNT(*) AS total\nFROM samples AS s\nINNER JOIN objects AS o ON o.data_id = s.data_id\nINNER JOIN data_provenances AS p ON o.provenance = p.ROWID\nWHERE s.data_type IN ("

- "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS entries (ROWID INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, os_build INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES unique_strings (ROWID) ON DELETE CASCADE, class_name INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES unique_strings (ROWID) ON DELETE CASCADE, size INTEGER NOT NULL, data BLOB NOT NULL)"
- "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS hr_c_set           (           ROWID                         INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,           data_id                       INTEGER         NOT NULL REFERENCES samples (data_id) ON DELETE CASCADE,           source                        TEXT            NOT NULL,           classification_type           TEXT            NOT NULL,           measure_identifier            TEXT            NOT NULL,           level_id                      TEXT            NOT NULL,           quantity_value                REAL,                               unit_string                   TEXT,                               scale_level_ids               BLOB,                               thresholds                    BLOB,                               score                         REAL,                               start_date                    REAL            NOT NULL,           end_date                      REAL            NOT NULL,           contributing_data             BLOB                            )"
- "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS key_value_store (key TEXT PRIMARY KEY, value BLOB NOT NULL, modification_date REAL NOT NULL)"
- "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS unique_strings (ROWID INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, string TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL)"
- "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS workout_builder_zones (ROWID INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, owner_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES workout_builders(ROWID) ON DELETE CASCADE, uuid BLOB NOT NULL, start_quantity REAL, end_quantity REAL, object_type INTEGER NOT NULL, time_in_zone REAL NOT NULL)"
- "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS workout_zones (ROWID INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT, owner_id INTEGER NOT NULL REFERENCES workouts(data_id) ON DELETE CASCADE, uuid BLOB NOT NULL, start_quantity REAL, end_quantity REAL, object_type INTEGER NOT NULL, time_in_zone REAL NOT NULL)"
- "CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE %@ (%@ BLOB NOT NULL)"
